hook.summary: A high-contrast re-engagement screen promising a massive coin bonus.
hook.visual_action: A cartoon bee mascot pulses while holding gold coins against a background of falling currency.
hook.text_overlay: WE MISS YOU COME BACK TO WIN 99,999,999,999 COINS & GEMS

scene_flow: Introduction of the 'We Miss You' re-engagement offer with a massive 99 billion coin balance.
Subtle pulsing animation on the 'START' button to drive user interaction.
Persistent display of the reward breakdown and legal disclaimer to establish legitimacy.
on_screen_text: *Total amount includes coins, gems, gift spins, chips, etc.
audience_proxy: Casual social casino players who have lapsed and are motivated by massive virtual currency rewards.
